reviews.review_description: It's my favorite game on VR. It's one of the very few collecting and building games that also has intense action. It's scary and intense. With great fighting mechanics. And I loved every moment of it. And yet, I was also heavily disappointed with it. The game is too limited. The walking dead world is massive and this game should have been massive. It should have matched the series, or a concept of it. If the world was really full of zombies, what would that look like and the mechanics of it? I wanted it to feel real, being in the actual apocalypse. The maps could have been bigger if not endless. Why couldn't I choose to travel the world? Make camps? The cities could have been larger. I wish I could have been able to decorate and build up my house. Why wasnt there more things I could steal or scavange? Why couldn't I have snuck into the enemies base and killed them all? Or joined a faction? Why wasn't I able to clear a town? There should have been a set amount of zombies in one place, they cant come back to life, they dont reproduce, once their dead, their dead, why can't I clear a town? Why wasn't this game an open world game? Or even a multiplayer open world game where you can fight against other players, zombies, NPC while all fighting over supplies and land.? While being able to build anything you please. It had so much potential to be extraordinary, and yet it felt like a quick write and send out. And the story was incredibly disappointing. The ending made no sense.

Blood stains on hands and weapons, having to craft to survive, realistic graphics and having to fight other survivors for loot makes it a great game, especially for a game made for the oculus 2, for people who are interested in the walking dead or want a realistic zombie game, is it great? Hell yeah, is it perfect? Absolutely not, there are a few major problems in the game, one of the greatest games out there tho, love this game but it’s best to buy it during sale, it is also for adrenaline junkies because zombies will constantly catch you off guard in dark areas with little to no warnings, risking your life in-game for loot, supplies or to complete a task, it is the ultimate survival game,  and by the way before you say things like “oh this is glazing” or “you completely ignored the bugs” remember that i mentioned problems in the game, lack of updates make it one of the lowest in the high selling

Thanks for reading this review, hope it helps

And by the way here are some ideas on updates
•new zombie variants (juggernaut,military, hazmat and learning zombies that learn to climb and to be strategic over time)

reviews.review_title: Best VR game I've ever played
reviews.review_description: This game is perfect, physics, graphics, map. Everything is so good it makes every other game I play seem trash. The story mode is so immersive, and you can continue playing endlessly after you complete the story. If you just got a quest 3/3s this is the first game I would recommend buying.

This game is incredible. I would say it gets a bit scary at times but that is just another part to this fantastic game. The story is incredible the book is a really good part to know what to do as many games i forget. If you are looking for a shootet game with a fantastic story this is the game for you.

When I started playing this game, I was very disappointed, bad tutorial, misunderstanding of recycling while collecting logs, shoes, broken weapons and so on. Over time, the purpose became clearer, the story developed, everything made sense. I made a mistake in leaving a review at the beginning of the game, I gave the game a chance and I was not wrong. The game is probably one of the best horror zombie games there is, the graphics are great, the story has its own flow. I also continued with the second part, Retribution, where you can transfer all the things from the first part. I recommend the game and don't make the same mistake as I did at the beginning, it will probably disappoint you but keep going, you will change your mind.

reviews.review_title: Still the best vr title I ever played!!!
reviews.review_description:
This game is awesome. The story and the thousands of hidden details en features you can do are the best thing ever.
This game is so realistic you just forget that it is VR, one tile i was being chased by twenty walkers and i only had a almost broken nive, a revolver with two bullets, and a shiv in my backpack. And once i killed the walkers i realised that i felt like i was really minutes away from death.

This game is a must play and something everyone should try!

Update: 
I recentely got the Quest 3 and I fell in love with this game all over again. One mistake I made was making my contrast too high, which made darker parts of the maps basicly black. 
But anyway, the game is a masterpiece and I am sad there aren’t more games like this.

reviews.review_title: An Honest Review of TWD S&S
reviews.review_description: I was scrolling on YouTube one day, and I found a short of this game. It looked cool, so I bought it. The game blew my mind. Graphic wise, however, it could defintely be improved. On the meta quest3s at least. PSVR 2 WILL make it real life. Peoples hair were like indented, but the bald head was still visible. It happened very rarely though. Their mouths didn’t always move either. Most of them times it worked. It was so much joyous fun! The story of the game is something that’ll come once every 5 years. The action was great. There was a variety of weapons. The second game has a lot more guns and weapons and supplies. My loving torwards this game cannot be expressed. If you’re gonna buy this, then buy chapter 2 : Retribution. The only thing this game needs to work on is the very very small amount of bugs. Also, if you do buy this, then I hope you wouldn’t mind giving a little spoiler to the beginning. It starts as you traveling to New Orleans, Louisiana in search of the Reserve, which contained a hell ton of supplies to last multiple lifetimes. To get there, you must take on missions to earn your trust and take on two factions fighting for control of the place. The Reclaimed is a cultist group whose goal is to spread fear for control, then get to the reserve. The Tower, however, is a strict disciplined organization of military personnel trying to get closer overtime to the reserve. Both factions have no problem helping others, unless you are someone who decides not to listen to one another. In this game you are that someone. Later, you’ll be able to decide who you want to help, and they’ll fight with you. If you decide to buy this, have fun!

This game is very fun. You can explore kill survivors kill zombies anyway you want you could do whatever you want you could kill Casey. I killed her. I recommend you’re killing her because you get more loot. You can make very cool guns in the game you could just get to the ending anywhere you want example kill Casey You can get good loot. If you don’t kill her you get terrible loot, but you still get out the game.

reviews.review_title: The scariest game I have ever played
reviews.review_description:
Im not one to play horror games often, but when I do, I pick scary ones. THIS game was my first vr horror experience, and it made me scared badly.

I genuinely was afraid to progress at times because I kept getting jumpscared by zombies. I have yet to get a Quest 3S because I only played this on the 2. And from what I've seen, the game is worth it's price.

reviews.review_title: good game But It gets boring after time
reviews.review_description: Don’t get me wrong I love this game and everything it has to offer this game is amazing and I would recommend it to everyone that I know but the only problem is it gets boring after awhile it would be amazing if there is multiplayer then the game would be amazing well better then it already is.

I could honestly go for hours about this amazing game, but to keep it short and simple, here are my top 10 favorite things about this game!

1. Scavenging loot and supplies feels amazing and personal as the stuff you gather in your backpack is yours 

2. Combat is very fun and have different weapons to do so (my fav is the bow)

3. Zombies look and are surprisingly realistic to how they would act in the Walking Dead series, they can track you down, sneak up on you, and even grab you from behind

4.The story is extremely interesting and entertaining as you progress through sections in new areas

5. Adventurous as you need to find keys and codes to safes for new recipes or loot

6. The notebook you carry is extremely important and gives you so much information

7. The NPCs are so much fun and immersive ask they either rob you or ask for your help

8. The guns feel somewhat realistic with their added weight and dependency of their iron sights

9. There are multiple houses that are lootable that also contain dark spaces with slight jump scares from walkers

10. The game continues as you either survive as long as you can or purchase retribution

I don’t know anything about The Walking Dead franchise but this game was amazing From start to finish And I will be restarting this game over and over and over again because this game is one of the best in my library￼￼
Besides from a few minor bugs and the low quality textures, I love this game. It is definetly worth buying, concidering it's quite cheap if you compare it to video game's prices nowadays.

Ending was fabulous I have never loved a VR game so much. I will always remember this game as the game that actually got me into vr. Thank you SkyDance for making such a cool game.

This Game is best described in this sentence: its great, but it needs more to be excellent. Let me explain
Crashes: i only encounted two crashes and thats at the tutorial level out of all levels.
Game's AI and dialogue: the NPCs' AI is superb, with their ability to hear the player can make stealth moments really difficult if you live in a noisy area and the Characters themselves are well written, however, not having the ability to actually communicate with the NPC humans freely in any environment they are in is unfortunate, and they can't negotiate
World and its enviroments: it really captures broken and torn world within a Zombie Apocalypse, especially in Old Town.
Loot and Crafting: one of the best loot and crafting systems out there for a survival horror game, it rewards players for exploring areas (especially ones with Food/Med Caches) or punish players for not optimising what they should and shouldn't grab. However there is one Problem with one of the lootable items and those are Matches, for whatever reason you cannot take a singular match out and light it, weird

All in all this is a Superb Survival Horror that could add a little more in some areas. Definitely worth checking out

reviews.review_title: Absolutely 5 stars we need a 3rd game
reviews.review_description:
I love this game so much, and I really hope they make a 3rd game. There is so much to do and the graphics are amazing. Its generally just a funny game to mess with the zombies. The story mode is also pretty good.

 Really the only two things I don't really like is the fact that the story mode is kinda short especially when you get really good at the game, it doesn't last any time at all.

 And number two is killing off Casey in the second game, now I feel like I completely wasted my time saving him because he just dies anyway, plus he is the best character. Other then that this is the best zombie game to get and I definitely recommend it

And btw it would be pretty cool if they added another mode to the game where you can play multiplayer.

reviews.review_title: Best zombie looter shooter on VR so far.
reviews.review_description:
This is genuinely one of the best zombie, survival, looter shooter VR game out there. I love the loot mechanics. The game feels responsive. The handling of weapons are a little wobbly but once you get the physics, it's not bad.

For what it's worth, it's a fun game and I don't think there's another game like this on Meta or Steam. Which is why I'm giving it a 5 star.

However it's not perfect. The game is too easy once you start to understand what to loot. And once you get a few upgrades and craftables. Then you can coast through. There's really no punishment for using loud guns. And the AI are simple and easy to work around. Still janky, like they can hear you outside opening cabinets and doors. Max enemies spawn are like 4. So you won't get swarmed like in Chapter 2.

But tis playable, not a lot of bugs, and it's a great first game if you're new to VR. If loot shooter, melee, zombie survival sounds like your kind of game, this game is perfect... for now.

Consumers log 01:20 (hh:mm):

I understand the complaints about the load time and maybe I am lucky, but I haven’t really had anything too bad. Maybe 30 seconds to a minute (yes it may be like waiting for GTA VI on PS3, but for the game it is, it’s worth it. There also hasn’t been any crashes yet. Also, it is kinda dark, but that’s what gives it the extra spooky factor. In my current progression, I’m very low on food and I’m probably going to die, but this is my first real survival game asides Into the Radius. This is a great game so far, there was one bug with the antenna in the bus disappearing but otherwise, this game seems to be earning its “bestselling” mark. Buy it, play it, if you don’t like it, return it!

Good work yall!


Consumer log 12:45

Ok yeas, this game is dope. I’ve finished it now only finding one ending, just barely getting into the aftershock dlc (which is played either with the QuickStart or finishing the story) and I have to say, this is one of the best games I’ve played that had a full story  and I’m genuinely sad that there’s no more story. Going to get the second game and dlc when I have the money for it!

reviews.review_title: Way too difficult and not fun at all
reviews.review_description:
Running gets you instantly exhausted, even killing 2-3 zombies drains your stamina fast. When traveling to cities theres a bell timer that will spawn a zombie horde after a period of time so you have no time to enjoy the game or explore the area and immerse yourself at your own phase. Really ruins the whole f*ckinf game 😤

The gunplay is so trash its insane, bullets go anywhere except where you aim. Weapons also breaks very fast due to low durability. Human hostile NPCs literally one shot you so combat is next to impossible if you dont have full health. You can’t bypass it as quest intels require you to go inside their territory

You have to install cheat mods to have fun otherwise i strongly advice you to buy Arizona Sunshine instead because this game is pure garbage
